title: PETZL TIKKA CORE Headlamp — 450 Lumens, Green
short_description: A rechargeable green PETZL TIKKA CORE headlamp with 450 lumens, a CORE battery, red lighting and optional operation with three AAA batteries.
long_description: The green PETZL TIKKA CORE is a compact rechargeable headlamp delivering up to 450 lumens at a weight of 84 grams. Its wide, uniform beam is useful for camping, hiking and close-range tasks. It also provides continuous and flashing red lighting. The included CORE battery on this Amazon variant charges through Micro-USB. Thanks to HYBRID CONCEPT, it can alternatively use three AAA/LR03 batteries.
buying_angle: Suitable for camping, night hiking and close-range work when a lightweight rechargeable headlamp with red lighting and optional battery operation is useful.
seo_title: PETZL TIKKA CORE 450 Lumens Green | Daily Deal Finder
meta_description: Green PETZL TIKKA CORE headlamp with 450 lumens, CORE battery, red lighting, 84 g weight and optional AAA battery operation.
pinterest_description: The green PETZL TIKKA CORE offers up to 450 lumens, a CORE battery, red lighting and optional use with three AAA batteries. #petzl #headlamp #camping
